svg.title: Playlist user flow and playback interaction
svg.desc: A professional flowchart showing the complete user journey from uploading files to playing music with next/prev controls

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What data is stored in Song?')
sendPrompt('Why use a doubly linked list?')
sendPrompt('What happens when play is pressed?')

text.style: font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; fill: #5F5E5A;;fill:rgb(95, 94, 90);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto
